summary: GM round 1 verdict written: Satisfied YES on Crewspace (OSS TypeScript framework → visual platform). Three-agent convergence confirmed. Revenue target $100-200K ARR Year 1. Addressed PM's 6-week validation concern with concurrent lean validation + Month 2 decision gate counter-proposal. Binding conditions set: developer-first GTM, ruthless scope cuts, 30% effort on community, no collaboration in v1.
